$comment: A2-37 dangling-token closure. Declares which path tokens each parameterized doc set references, so the consuming validator can assert config.yaml defines every token a Core/profile doc uses (no dangling tokens) AND that no Core doc references a token config does not define. Generated by grepping the live Core docs + profile.md on 2026-06-12; regenerate with tests/regen_required_tokens.py when a doc's token usage changes. The check is two-way: missing-from-config (dangling) is severity=error; defined-but-unreferenced (orphan token) is severity=warning.

core.description: The parameterized Procheiron Core docs under {paths.console}/. The union of these tokens MUST be defined in config.yaml paths (plus the implicit {root}).

profile.description: The deployment profile prose (profile.md). Its tokens must also resolve (it is read at boot per AGENT_BOOT §0).

$note_scripts: {paths.scripts} is referenced by memory record source_paths (e.g. {paths.scripts}/verify_lu_ghl.sh), not by Core/profile prose. It is required by config.schema.json's paths.required because records cite it, but it is not in any prose doc_set above.
